name: Dreamdata B2B Revenue Attribution API
what_it_does: B2B revenue attribution platform with REST API — connecting all marketing and sales touchpoints (ads, website, email, CRM, product usage) to revenue outcomes with multi-touch attribution, customer journey analytics, pipeline impact measurement, and ROI reporting for B2B go-to-market teams.
use_cases: Querying multi-touch attribution models for campaign revenue impact reporting
Pulling account-level customer journey data for sales and marketing alignment
Integrating Dreamdata attribution data with BI tools for executive dashboards
Analyzing pipeline influence by channel for go-to-market budget optimization
Connecting ad spend (Google, LinkedIn, Facebook) to closed revenue via API
not_for: Single-touch last-click attribution (use simpler analytics tools)
Product analytics and user behavior tracking (use Amplitude or Mixpanel)
best_when: A B2B SaaS revenue operations team wants to understand the full customer journey from first touch to closed revenue, connecting marketing, sales, and product signals for true multi-touch attribution.
avoid_when: You're B2C, use simple last-click attribution, need product analytics rather than revenue attribution, or have fewer than ~100 deals/year to make statistical analysis meaningful.

auth.notes: API key from Dreamdata account. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. No webhooks. Data integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads) configured via Dreamdata admin — not API-driven. Attribution models calculated by Dreamdata pipeline.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited attribution data
pricing.notes: Danish company (Copenhagen). Founded 2018. Raised $12M Series A (2022). B2B-native attribution differentiator vs B2C-focused tools. Account-level (not user-level) journey tracking appropriate for B2B sales cycles. Connects CRM deals to marketing touchpoints natively. Strong in European B2B SaaS companies. GDPR-compliant cookieless tracking.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for attribution data, journeys, pipeline impact, and channel analytics. Bearer token auth. Good developer documentation. Attribution pipeline runs daily — not real-time. Data integrations (CRM, ads) configured separately. Account-level attribution requires CRM account ID linkage.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Attribution reads fully idempotent. Journey reads idempotent. Channel analytics reads idempotent by date range. Pipeline reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Attribution data has 24-48 hour latency — daily pipeline run, not real-time
CRM integration (Salesforce/HubSpot) required before revenue attribution is available
Ad platform OAuth (Google Ads, LinkedIn) required for spend data integration
Account-level attribution — user-level B2C attribution is not the use case
Statistical validity requires sufficient deal volume — small deal counts skew models

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. Bearer token auth. Revenue and pipeline data is sensitive — restrict API access. Ad platform OAuth tokens for spend data require secure storage. Danish company with GDPR-first design approach.
